summary: A Department of Labor video narrated by a spoken voiceover ('Under President Trump's leadership, we are building a new golden age...') over stock b-roll, intercut with a C-SPAN3 news feed of Acting Labor Secretary Keith Sonderling speaking at an investment summit. The video contains voiceover, speech, and news-feed footage. No music track.
notable_text: KEITH SONDERLING Acting Labor Secretary; NATIONAL HARBOR, MD; INVESTMENT SUMMIT; C-SPAN3
